structure.role: FastAPI Python backend (Python 3.12, uvicorn/gunicorn). All business logic, ElevenLabs agent integration, post-call processing, outbound orchestration, billing, and third-party integrations.
Vite + React 19 SPA. German-only UI, Supabase auth, React Query v5 for server state, Tailwind + Radix UI components, recharts for dashboards, FullCalendar for appointments.
73 numbered SQL migrations applied to Supabase (PostgreSQL). Defines all schema: tables, RLS policies, indexes.
FastAPI routers — one file per domain. Includes a tools/ sub-directory for 11 ElevenLabs agent tool webhook handlers.
Business-logic layer. Every route delegates to a service function here. Sub-dirs: ai/ (OpenAI copilot), cases/ (LLM grouper), copilot/ (orchestrator + tools).
Cross-cutting infrastructure: config (Pydantic Settings), Redis cache, Fernet crypto, logging/observability middleware.
Architecture audit artefacts. _data/ holds machine-readable maps (this file). rules/ for audit rules.
One-off operational scripts (history import, backfills, etc.).
n8n workflow export — legacy automation blueprint for provisioning and post-call forwarding (superseded by native backend routes).

dbTables.purpose: Root tenant table: one row per tradesperson business. Holds ElevenLabs agent_id, org_code, billing fields.
Per-org encrypted secrets (legacy; main secrets now in env or oauth_connections).
CRM user accounts (org_admin + employees). Linked to Supabase Auth.
Customer/caller contact records per org.
Inbound/outbound call records from ElevenLabs. Central CRM event. Enhanced by many later migrations (emergency_flag 0024, deleted_at 0043, pds_synced 0069, is_spam 0071).
Service requests created during a call (ANF- numbered). Linked to calls, customers, cases.
Scheduled appointments, slots, and Google Calendar imports (source='google_import' from migration 0033).
KVA (Kostenvoranschlag) / cost estimate documents with line items.
Invoices linked to customers and projects, with PDF generation.
Employee records per org with roles, colors, absence tracking. Extended by 0059 (is_technician).
Per-org Kiki AI agent config: scheduling rules, autonomy level, enabled features.
Service catalog items with pricing (used for cost estimates and price knowledge base).
AI-generated suggestions for CRM actions (proactive AI).
Time tracking entries for employees.
File attachments (PDFs, images) linked to various entities. Stored in Supabase Storage.
Employee absence records (vacation, sick leave) affecting slot availability.
Fleet vehicles for the planning board.
Tool/equipment inventory for the planning board.
Reusable text snippets for cost estimates, invoices, emails.
Top-layer project grouping above Cases (PR- numbered). Restored in migration 0073 as a separate layer above cases.
Many-to-many: project ↔ employee assignments.
Per-org email sending config: OAuth provider choice or custom SMTP credentials (Fernet-encrypted).
PDS-Software ERP integration config: API URL + Bearer key (Fernet-encrypted) per org.
Ordered list of fields Kiki must capture during a call (name, phone, address, etc.).
Named appointment types per org with duration defaults.
Services the agent is trained to handle (plumbing, heating, etc.).
Knowledge base documents (URL/file/text) pushed to ElevenLabs KB. Tracks sync status and elevenlabs_doc_id.
Full ElevenLabs agent config snapshots before every write (enables rollback).
Audit log of every ElevenLabs agent config mutation: diff, HTTP status, rollback flag.
Structured actions attached to AI suggestions (e.g., create appointment, update customer).
Ledger for outbound call dispatches — idempotency guard prevents double-dialing.
Recurring service maintenance plan records per customer.
Calls that went unanswered, for follow-up tracking.
Stored OAuth tokens (Google/Microsoft/Calendly) per org. Refresh tokens encrypted at rest.
Links an oauth_connection to a purpose (email, calendar) enabling multi-provider routing.
AI copilot session threads per org/user.
Individual messages within a copilot conversation (user + assistant turns).
Audit log of copilot-initiated CRM mutations.
Cases where the copilot escalated to a human operator.
Per-org AI spend ledger (tokens * cost) enforcing monthly cap (COPILOT_MONTHLY_COST_CAP_USD).
Scheduled/deferred action tasks triggered by agent suggestions or outbound occasions.
Many-to-many links between calls/inquiries and cases for the Vorgang threading view.
Case records (FL- numbered). The core CRM ticket: groups calls + inquiries under a customer. Renamed from former projects table in migration 0073.
Write ledger for every Stripe mutation (audit-first model, like agent_writes_audit).
Received Stripe webhook events for idempotency and audit.
Per-call Stripe usage records (idempotent by call_id).
Log of subscription migration steps when moving orgs between Stripe plans.
Security-sensitive billing events (cross-org guard violations, etc.).
In-app billing alert records (80% usage warning, plan upgrade prompts).
Stripe Checkout session records for plan upgrades.
Token-secured job links sent to field technicians (no login required — token IS the credential).
Log of PDS-Software sync attempts (call log push, contact create) with status and error details.

integrations.name: ElevenLabs
integrations.authMechanism: xi-api-key header (ELEVENLABS_API_KEY). Inbound tool webhooks authenticated via org_id scoping (resolve_tool_org dep). Inbound post-call via POST_CALL_WEBHOOK_SECRET.
integrations.failureMode: ElevenLabsWriteError / VerificationFailedError — auto-rollback from snapshot on verify failure. Post-call: non-fatal (logged). Transfer: graceful degradation (speaks number, no bridge).

integrations.name: Supabase
integrations.authMechanism: Backend: service-role key (SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY) bypasses RLS. Frontend: anon key (VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY) with Supabase JWT session tokens. JWT verified via SUPABASE_JWT_SECRET (backend).
integrations.failureMode: RuntimeError at startup if URL/key missing in production. HTTP 500 on query failure. Frontend: auth state cleared, redirect to /login.

integrations.name: Stripe
integrations.authMechanism: STRIPE_SECRET_KEY (sk_test_* / sk_live_*). Webhook signature verification via STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET. Entire router only mounted when STRIPE_BILLING_ENABLED=1.
integrations.failureMode: StripeConfigError / StripeBillingError on API error. ConnectAttributionError blocks writes to legacy Connect subs. Pinned to stripe==11.6.0 (pre-v12) due to usage-records API incompatibility.

integrations.name: Brevo (SMTP + HTTP API)
integrations.authMechanism: BREVO_SMTP_KEY for SMTP relay (smtp-relay.brevo.com:587). BREVO_API_KEY for HTTP API (api.brevo.com/v3) as tier-3 fallback (Railway blocks outbound SMTP 587).
integrations.failureMode: Tier-3 fallback in 3-tier chain (Gmail OAuth -> customer SMTP -> Brevo). If all tiers fail, exception re-raised to caller. Failure logged but never silently swallowed.

integrations.name: Google (OAuth2 / Gmail API / Calendar API)
integrations.authMechanism: OAuth2 authorization code flow. GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID + GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET. Access tokens refreshed automatically via oauth_tokens.get_valid_access_token(). Stored encrypted in oauth_connections.
integrations.failureMode: OAuthTokenError when no valid connection. Calendar sync failure is non-fatal (logged). Email: falls through to next tier in 3-tier chain.

integrations.name: Microsoft (Azure AD OAuth2 / Graph API)
integrations.authMechanism: OAuth2 authorization code flow via login.microsoftonline.com/common. MS_CLIENT_ID + MS_CLIENT_SECRET. Scopes: Mail.Send + Calendars.ReadWrite.
integrations.failureMode: OAuthTokenError when token expired/missing. Email send falls through to next tier.

integrations.name: Calendly
integrations.authMechanism: OAuth2 via auth.calendly.com. CALENDLY_CLIENT_ID + CALENDLY_CLIENT_SECRET. Calendar-only (no email). Token stored in oauth_connections.
integrations.failureMode: OAuthTokenError when no connection. Calendar-only integration — no email fallback path.

integrations.name: OpenAI
integrations.authMechanism: OPENAI_API_KEY. Router only mounted when COPILOT_ENABLED=1. Model configurable via OPENAI_COPILOT_MODEL (default gpt-4o) and OPENAI_CLASSIFIER_MODEL (default gpt-4o-mini). Monthly cost cap via ai_usage_log.
integrations.failureMode: Client disabled (no-op) when API key not set. Timeout after OPENAI_TIMEOUT_SECONDS (default 30s). Spend cap enforced per-org.

integrations.name: Redis
integrations.authMechanism: REDIS_URL (connection string includes password). Lazy-initialized: disabled entirely when REDIS_URL is empty. Org-scoped keys only.
integrations.failureMode: Fail-open: any Redis error is a cache miss / no-op. Never breaks a request. Single-flight stampede guard with lock TTL.

integrations.name: Twilio
integrations.authMechanism: TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID + TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN (basic auth to api.twilio.com). For outbound calls: ElevenLabs orchestrates via its native Twilio integration (no direct Twilio dial). For transfer: direct TwiML redirect via REST.
integrations.failureMode: Graceful degradation on transfer: if creds or call_sid missing, speaks number to caller but does not bridge. Logged with reason. OutboundCallError on ElevenLabs/Twilio integration failure.

integrations.name: n8n
integrations.authMechanism: POST_CALL_WEBHOOK_SECRET / MASTER_WEBHOOK_SECRET (X-HeyKiki-Secret or Authorization header). n8n forwards ElevenLabs post-call payloads to /api/elevenlabs/post-call and triggers /api/outbound/run-due-reminders.
integrations.failureMode: Body shape normalized (ElevenLabs envelope / flat / N8N item array). Deduplication prevents double-processing on n8n retries. PDS routes provide native replacement for n8n PDS workflows.

integrations.name: PDS-Software
integrations.authMechanism: Bearer token stored Fernet-encrypted in pds_configs.api_key. Per-org api_url. Ported from n8n workflows.
integrations.failureMode: Non-fatal: PDS failure never breaks call processing. best-effort on post-call auto-sync. Errors recorded in pds_sync_log.

integrations.name: Sentry
integrations.authMechanism: SENTRY_DSN environment variable. Lazy-initialized at startup only when DSN is set.
integrations.failureMode: Dormant (no-op) when SENTRY_DSN not set. Init failure logged as warning but never blocks boot.

dependencyEdges.reason: Auth sessions (anon key + JWT). Two clients: heykiki-customer-auth + heykiki-admin-auth storage keys.
All CRM data reads/writes via VITE_API_URL + Supabase JWT Bearer token.
Service-role client for all DB operations. HTTP/1.1 forced for thread-safe concurrent fan-out.
Agent config CRUD, knowledge base management, health probes via xi-api-key REST.
POST /v1/convai/twilio/outbound-call to place outbound calls via ElevenLabs-Twilio bridge.
Tool webhook handlers called by ElevenLabs agent during active calls.
Conversation initiation webhook — ElevenLabs calls this on call connect to get per-org config.
n8n forwards ElevenLabs post-call payload here after call ends.
Auto-sync call log to PDS after processing (best-effort, non-fatal).
Direct Twilio REST API call to redirect live inbound call TwiML to human number.
Tier-1 email: Gmail API via OAuth access token.
Tier-1 email: Microsoft Graph API via OAuth access token.
Tier-3 fallback email relay when org has no OAuth or custom SMTP configured.
Read-only pull of Google primary calendar events into appointments table.
Copilot chat completions and tool calls. Classifiers for emergency detection and employee auto-assign.
Subscription reads, usage records, billing portal sessions, customer management.
Receives Stripe webhook events (subscription created/updated/deleted, invoice paid).
Org-scoped caching for read-heavy endpoints. Fail-open: disabled when REDIS_URL not set.
Per-org rate limiting using Redis counters.
Error tracking for unhandled exceptions. Dormant until SENTRY_DSN set.

dataFlows.name: Inbound call: caller rings → inquiry created
steps: 1. Caller dials Twilio number linked to ElevenLabs agent.
2. ElevenLabs fires GET /api/elevenlabs/conversation-init → backend looks up org by phone number, returns per-org config (business hours, first message, agent prompt override).
3. ElevenLabs conducts conversation; each tool call hits /api/tools/* webhook endpoints (identify-customer, create-inquiry, book-appointment, etc.).
4. Call ends → ElevenLabs notifies n8n with post-call payload.
5. n8n forwards to POST /api/elevenlabs/post-call (secret-protected).
6. post_call.py normalizes payload, inserts/updates call row in Supabase, links inquiry, creates missed_call if needed.
7. If org has PDS config: best-effort sync of call log to PDS-Software via pds.py.
8. If STRIPE_USAGE_REPORTING_ENABLED: background task reports call duration to Stripe usage records.
9. Appointment notification emails sent if appointment was booked (email_send.py 3-tier chain).

dataFlows.name: Outbound call: occasion-driven reminder
steps: 1. Cron / n8n fires POST /api/outbound/run-due-reminders (secret-protected).
2. outbound_dispatch.py scans outbound-enabled orgs for due occasions (appointment_reminder, kva_followup, etc.).
3. Scope guard: if OUTBOUND_TEST_SCOPE_ONLY=1, only allowed org IDs can proceed; real numbers replaced by test number.
4. outbound_call.py POSTs to ElevenLabs /v1/convai/twilio/outbound-call with per-call dynamic variables + prompt override.
5. ElevenLabs + Twilio places the call; conversation_id written to outbound_calls ledger.
6. Call ends → post-call flow (same as inbound) processes the conversation.
7. Optional occasion email (OUTBOUND_OCCASION_EMAILS_ENABLED) sent in parallel via email_send.py.

dataFlows.name: Agent configuration (Kiki-Zentrale)
steps: 1. Org admin edits config in KikiZentralePage (first message, prompt, voice, business hours, knowledge resources).
2. Frontend POSTs to /api/kiki-zentrale/config.
3. Backend calls patch_agent_safely(): cross-org guard → snapshot to agent_config_snapshots → deep-merge → audio assertion → PATCH ElevenLabs REST → post-write verify → audit to agent_writes_audit.
4. On verify failure: automatic rollback to snapshot + VerificationFailedError returned.
5. Knowledge resources: uploaded to Supabase Storage → pushed to ElevenLabs KB API → doc_id stored in knowledge_resources.

dataFlows.name: Call transfer (emergency / staff)
steps: 1. ElevenLabs agent detects transfer intent and calls /api/tools/transfer-call.
2. transfer.py reads emergency_number / incoming_forwarding_number from agent_configs.
3. If Twilio creds + call_sid present: Twilio REST API redirects live call TwiML to human number.
4. Returns success + transfer message regardless (graceful degradation if Twilio not configured).

dataFlows.name: Email send (3-tier chain)
steps: 1. Trigger: appointment confirmation, KVA PDF, invoice, employee invite.
2. Tier 1: if org has Google OAuth → Gmail API send.
3. Tier 2: if org has Microsoft OAuth → Microsoft Graph API send.
4. Tier 3: if org has customer SMTP → smtplib SMTP (Fernet-decrypt password).
5. Tier 4 (HeyKiki fallback): Brevo HTTP API (api.brevo.com/v3) — Railway blocks outbound SMTP 587.

dataFlows.name: Google Calendar sync
steps: 1. Org admin triggers sync from SettingsPage → POST /api/calendar-settings/sync-google.
2. calendar_sync.py fetches OAuth token (auto-refresh via oauth_tokens.py).
3. Google Calendar API: GET primary calendar events for 60-day forward window.
4. Events upserted into appointments table (source='google_import') to block AI slot finder.
5. Deleted events → status='cancelled' to free slots.

dataFlows.name: Org provisioning
steps: 1. Super-admin POSTs to /api/heykiki/provision (MASTER_WEBHOOK_SECRET required).
2. provisioning.py: creates organization row, seeds agent_configs with defaults, creates required_fields.
3. agent_config.py: configures ElevenLabs agent (webhook URL, tool IDs, override flags, language).
4. Background: history_import.py fetches historical ElevenLabs conversations and backfills calls table.
5. Optional Stripe: stripe_provisioning.py links org to Stripe customer.

dataFlows.name: Stripe billing lifecycle
steps: 1. Customer visits /settings/abrechnung → GET /api/billing/status (reads Stripe subscription).
2. Upgrade: POST /api/billing/portal → Stripe Billing Portal session URL → redirect.
3. Stripe webhook: POST /api/stripe-webhook (signature verified) → stripe_webhook.py updates org billing fields in Supabase.
4. Per-call usage: post-call hook triggers billing_usage.report_call_usage → Stripe usage record.
5. 80% warning: billing_notifications inserted → frontend billing banner.

dataFlows.name: PDS-Software sync (post-call)
steps: 1. post_call.py finishes inserting call row.
2. If org has pds_configs row: pds.sync_call_to_pds() called (best-effort, non-fatal).
3. pds.py decrypts Bearer token from pds_configs, calls PDS API: person/listpersonen (lookup by phone) → crm/createaufgabe (log call task).
4. Result (success/error) written to pds_sync_log.

dataFlows.name: AI copilot (Kiki Assistent)
steps: 1. User types message in copilot widget (VITE_COPILOT_ENABLED=1 + COPILOT_ENABLED=1).
2. POST /api/copilot/message → copilot/orchestrator.py.
3. OpenAI gpt-4o completion with tool definitions (read/write CRM data).
4. Tool calls: copilot/tools.py executes CRM actions (create inquiry, update customer, etc.), audited in copilot_action_audit.
5. Response + actions streamed back. ai_usage_log updated. Monthly cap checked.

envVars.name: APP_ENV
envVars.usedFor: Deployment environment flag. 'production' enables fail-fast startup validation and Sentry prod tag.

envVars.name: SUPABASE_URL
envVars.usedFor: Supabase project REST endpoint. Required in production.

envVars.name: SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY
envVars.usedFor: Supabase service-role key (bypasses RLS). Backend only. Required in production.

envVars.name: SUPABASE_JWT_SECRET
envVars.usedFor: Supabase JWT signing secret for verifying user Bearer tokens on backend routes.

envVars.name: MASTER_WEBHOOK_SECRET
envVars.usedFor: Shared secret guarding /api/heykiki/provision and super-admin routes. Must be set in production.

envVars.name: POST_CALL_WEBHOOK_SECRET
envVars.usedFor: Shared secret guarding /api/elevenlabs/post-call and /api/outbound/run-due-reminders (X-HeyKiki-Secret).

envVars.name: JWKS_TTL_SECONDS
envVars.usedFor: TTL for cached Supabase JWKS (default 300s). Controls how quickly a rotated signing key stops being trusted.

envVars.name: CORS_ORIGINS
envVars.usedFor: Comma-separated list of allowed CORS origins (e.g., frontend URL). Default: http://localhost:5173.

envVars.name: ELEVENLABS_API_KEY
envVars.usedFor: ElevenLabs xi-api-key for agent config reads/writes, KB management, and history import.

envVars.name: TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID
envVars.usedFor: Twilio Account SID for live call transfer (TwiML redirect). Optional — graceful degradation without it.

envVars.name: TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN
envVars.usedFor: Twilio Auth Token (paired with TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID). Optional.

envVars.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
envVars.usedFor: OpenAI API key for copilot + classifiers. Dormant when not set.

envVars.name: COPILOT_ENABLED
envVars.usedFor: Feature flag (0/1) — mounts the /api/copilot router and shows copilot widget. Default 0.

envVars.name: OPENAI_COPILOT_MODEL
envVars.usedFor: OpenAI model for copilot completions. Default: gpt-4o.

envVars.name: OPENAI_CLASSIFIER_MODEL
envVars.usedFor: OpenAI model for cheap classifiers (emergency detection, employee auto-assign). Default: gpt-4o-mini.

envVars.name: OPENAI_TIMEOUT_SECONDS
envVars.usedFor: Network timeout for OpenAI API calls. Default: 30.0s.

envVars.name: COPILOT_MONTHLY_COST_CAP_USD
envVars.usedFor: Soft per-org monthly OpenAI spend cap in USD. 0 = no cap. Default: 25.0.

envVars.name: SETTINGS_ENC_KEY
envVars.usedFor: Fernet symmetric encryption key for storing third-party credentials (OAuth tokens, PDS API keys, customer SMTP passwords).

envVars.name: GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID
envVars.usedFor: Google OAuth2 client ID for Gmail + Calendar integration.

envVars.name: GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET
envVars.usedFor: Google OAuth2 client secret.

envVars.name: MS_CLIENT_ID
envVars.usedFor: Microsoft Azure AD OAuth2 client ID for Outlook/Graph integration.

envVars.name: MS_CLIENT_SECRET
envVars.usedFor: Microsoft Azure AD OAuth2 client secret.

envVars.name: CALENDLY_CLIENT_ID
envVars.usedFor: Calendly OAuth2 client ID for calendar sync.

envVars.name: CALENDLY_CLIENT_SECRET
envVars.usedFor: Calendly OAuth2 client secret.

envVars.name: BACKEND_PUBLIC_URL
envVars.usedFor: Publicly reachable backend URL (used to build OAuth redirect URIs registered with Google/Azure). Default: http://localhost:8000.

envVars.name: FRONTEND_PUBLIC_URL
envVars.usedFor: Public frontend URL for employee set-password links and billing portal return URL. Must be on Supabase Auth redirect allow-list.

envVars.name: BREVO_SMTP_KEY
envVars.usedFor: Brevo SMTP relay API key (read as BREVO_SMTP_KEY env var). Tier-3 email fallback.

envVars.name: BREVO_SMTP_FROM_ADDRESS
envVars.usedFor: From address for Brevo SMTP emails. Default: info@kiki-zusammenfassung.de.

envVars.name: BREVO_API_KEY
envVars.usedFor: Brevo transactional HTTP API key for /v3/smtp/email (used when SMTP 587 is blocked by Railway).

envVars.name: REDIS_URL
envVars.usedFor: Redis connection URL (includes password). Activates caching and rate limiting. Dormant when empty.

envVars.name: CACHE_PREFIX
envVars.usedFor: Redis key namespace prefix to prevent collisions between environments sharing one Redis. Default: kj.

envVars.name: OBSERVABILITY_ENABLED
envVars.usedFor: Feature flag (0/1) — enables structured JSON logging + request-context middleware. Default 0.

envVars.name: OUTBOUND_TEST_SCOPE_ONLY
envVars.usedFor: Safety guard (default 1=ON). Forces all outbound calls/emails to test numbers/addresses only. Set to 0 for go-live.

envVars.name: OUTBOUND_TEST_NUMBER
envVars.usedFor: Override destination for outbound calls when scope guard is ON. Default: +917879997839.

envVars.name: OUTBOUND_TEST_EMAIL
envVars.usedFor: Override destination for outbound emails when scope guard is ON. Default: agrawalamber01@gmail.com.

envVars.name: OUTBOUND_TEST_ORG_IDS
envVars.usedFor: Comma-separated org UUIDs allowed to use outbound when scope guard is ON.

envVars.name: OUTBOUND_OCCASION_EMAILS_ENABLED
envVars.usedFor: Feature flag (0/1) — enables emails attached to outbound calling occasions. Default 0.

envVars.name: STRIPE_SECRET_KEY
envVars.usedFor: Stripe secret API key (sk_test_* or sk_live_*). Billing disabled when empty. Live key triggers additional validation.

envVars.name: STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET
envVars.usedFor: Stripe webhook signing secret (whsec_*) for verifying incoming events. Required if using live Stripe key.

envVars.name: STRIPE_BILLING_ENABLED
envVars.usedFor: Feature flag (0/1) — mounts billing router (billing, billing_admin, stripe_webhook). Default 0.

envVars.name: STRIPE_USAGE_REPORTING_ENABLED
envVars.usedFor: Feature flag (0/1) — enables per-call Stripe usage reporting. Requires STRIPE_BILLING_ENABLED=1. Default 0.

envVars.name: BILLING_PORTAL_RETURN_URL
envVars.usedFor: Return URL for Stripe billing portal session. Falls back to FRONTEND_PUBLIC_URL + /settings/abrechnung.

envVars.name: SENTRY_DSN
envVars.usedFor: Sentry DSN for error tracking. Dormant when not set — zero behavior change without it.

envVars.name: VITE_API_URL
envVars.usedFor: Frontend: backend API base URL baked into the Vite build. Default: https://backend-production-3f88a.up.railway.app.

envVars.name: VITE_SUPABASE_URL
envVars.usedFor: Frontend: Supabase project URL baked into Vite build for @supabase/supabase-js client.

envVars.name: VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY
envVars.usedFor: Frontend: Supabase anon (publishable) key baked into Vite build.

envVars.name: VITE_COPILOT_ENABLED
envVars.usedFor: Frontend: build-time flag (0/1) to show/hide the copilot widget. Default 1 in prod builds.
